endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Solutions/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.Solutions REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Solutions/appliances
endpoints.description: Gets all the appliances within a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Solutions/applianceDefinitions
endpoints.description: Lists the appliance definitions in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Solutions/applianceDefinitions/{applianceDefinitionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLIANCEDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real appliancedefinitionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Solutions/applianceDefinitions/{applianceDefinitionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLIANCEDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real appliancedefinitionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Solutions/applianceDefinitions/{applianceDefinitionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLIANCEDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real appliancedefinitionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Solutions/appliances
endpoints.description: Gets all the appliances within a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Solutions/appliances/{applianceName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{APPLIANCENAME}} with a real appliancename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Solutions/appliances/{applianceName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{APPLIANCENAME}} with a real appliancename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Solutions/appliances/{applianceName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{APPLIANCENAME}} with a real appliancename.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Solutions/appliances/{applianceName}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing appliance. The only value that can be updated via PATCH currently is the tags.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{APPLIANCENAME}} with a real appliancename.

endpoints.name: GET /{applianceDefinitionId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLIANCEDEFINITIONID}} with a real appliancedefinitionid.

endpoints.name: PUT /{applianceDefinitionId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLIANCEDEFINITIONID}} with a real appliancedefinitionid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{applianceDefinitionId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLIANCEDEFINITIONID}} with a real appliancedefinitionid.

endpoints.name: GET /{applianceId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLIANCEID}} with a real applianceid.

endpoints.name: PUT /{applianceId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLIANCEID}} with a real applianceid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{applianceId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLIANCEID}} with a real applianceid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /{applianceId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing appliance. The only value that can be updated via PATCH currently is the tags.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLIANCEID}} with a real applianceid.
